caption:
Assalamualaikum warahmatullahi wabarakatuh 🌙

Alhamdulillah, the Iftar Jamaie event was successfully held and filled with warmth, unity, and meaningful moments. We are truly grateful to everyone who attended and to all volunteers and contributors who gave their time, effort, and support to make this gathering possible.

Your presence brought joy, strengthened our bond as a community, and reminded us of the beauty of sharing blessings during this special time. Moments like these create memories that stay in our hearts and inspire us to continue spreading kindness and togetherness.

May every contribution, big or small, be rewarded with endless blessings. Thank you for being part of this meaningful event. We hope to meet again in our future programs, insyaAllah. 🤍

Warm regards, 
Institusi Usrah MMU Melaka

🌙 Salam Aidilfitri 1447H 🌙

Dengan penuh rasa syukur dan kegembiraan, warga Persatuan Seni Silat Cekak Pusaka Ustaz Hanafi MMU Melaka ingin mengucapkan Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri, Maaf Zahir dan Batin kepada semua ahli, alumni, guru, serta seluruh umat Islam.

Semoga hari kemenangan ini membawa keberkatan, mengeratkan silaturahim, serta menguatkan lagi semangat persaudaraan dalam perjuangan memartabatkan warisan seni silat kita.

Jika ada salah dan silap sepanjang pergaulan dan latihan, kami menyusun sepuluh jari memohon ampun dan maaf.

✨ Semoga Aidilfitri ini disambut dengan penuh kegembiraan bersama keluarga tercinta.

Salam Aidilfitri, Maaf Zahir & Batin
Ikhlas daripada,
Persatuan Seni Silat Cekak Pusaka Ustaz Hanafi MMU Melaka

#psscpuh #psscpuhmelaka

Together We Share, Together We Care 🤍

Pada 8 Mac yang lalu, pelajar MMU telah menjayakan program Ramadan Sweet Charity 5.0: Tautan Kasih bersama adik-adik di Rumah Anak Yatim Darul Aitam.

Hari yang dipenuhi dengan aktiviti gotong-royong, gelak tawa melalui pelbagai aktiviti bersama, dan momen indah yang mengeratkan hubungan antara kami semua ✨

Kami juga berpeluang berkongsi rezeki melalui pemberian hadiah raya serta iftar bersama — satu pengalaman yang bukan sahaja memberi kegembiraan kepada mereka, tetapi juga menyentuh hati kami ❤️

Semoga setiap senyuman yang terukir menjadi kenangan yang kekal, dan setiap kebaikan yang dikongsi membawa keberkatan buat semua.

Kerana kasih itu bukan sekadar diberi, tetapi dirasai 🤍
locationName: Rumah Anak Yatim Darul Aitam, Bukit Pegoh

#psscpuh #psscpuhmelaka

🌙 RAMADHAN SWEET CHARITY 🌙

Together We Share, Together We Care

⸻

💖 Infak Kasih | 7 March

At the masjid, we begin with service and sincerity. We clean the sacred space together, then cook side by side to prepare meals for the community. Through simple acts done with pure intention, we transform effort into charity — because together we share, together we care.

⸻

🍽 Iftar Jamaie | 7 March

As the sun sets, MMU Melaka students and the surrounding local community gather to break fast as one. Sharing food, prayers, and conversations, we celebrate unity and gratitude — a reminder that Ramadhan is most beautiful when experienced together.

⸻

🤝 Tautan Kasih | 8 March

Held at an orphanage, this day is about giving time and attention. We clean, connect, and share moments of laughter before breaking fast together. In these simple moments, bonds are formed and hearts are touched, reminding every child that they are not alone.

⸻

🌌 Singgah Sahur | 9 March

In the quiet hours before dawn, kindness continues its journey. Volunteers distribute sahur meals to those in need, ensuring no one begins their fast in hunger or solitude. A silent act of compassion that proves care does not sleep.

⸻

💛 Every act counts. Every moment matters.
Together we share, together we care… together we scan the QR to give.

🎉 CSRW IS LIVE! 🎉
PSSCPUH Melaka is now at Club & Society Registration Week (3–5 Dec)! We invite all MMU Melaka students to visit our booth 🥋✨

Meet the team, watch demos, try basic moves, and learn how Silat Cekak builds discipline, confidence, and self-defence skills.

New or curious, everyone’s welcome. Jom singgah! 💪🔥

📍 MMU Melaka – CSRW Booth Area
📅 3–5 Dec

🔥 KONVENSYEN SILAT CEKAK PUSAKA HANAFI 🔥
Alhamdulillah, Konvensyen Silat Cekak Pusaka Hanafi telah berlangsung dengan jayanya pada 18 Januari 2026 bertempat di University Multimedia, Melaka.

Konvensyen ini menghimpunkan ahli-ahli silat Cekak Pusaka Hanafi dari seluruh Zon Selatan, hasil kerjasama erat antara Majlis Perguruan & Persilatan (MPP) bersama Majlis Persilatan Negeri-Negeri (MPN) Zon Selatan.

Program ini bukan sekadar perhimpunan, tetapi menjadi medan mengukuhkan ukhuwah, disiplin serta semangat mempertahankan warisan seni persilatan Melayu yang berteraskan jati diri dan adab.

Semoga usaha ini terus menyuburkan legasi persilatan untuk generasi akan datang.

Club & Society Registration Week!!

[MARTIAL ARTS SOCIAL NIGHT - MARTIAL ARTS DRAMA]

✨ MMU Melaka's First Ever Martial Arts Drama – Martial Arts Social Night! ✨

Get ready for an electrifying night filled with action, drama, and incredible martial arts performances! 🎭💥 The first ever Martial Arts Drama at MMU Melaka is here, and it’s set to be an unforgettable experience for everyone!

Why You Can't Miss This Event: 

🔥 Epic Martial Arts Drama: Watch as skilled martial artists bring an original story to life with jaw-dropping action and choreography! 

🎁 Exclusive Lucky Draw Prizes: Be lucky to take home exciting prizes during our special draw!

 💥 One Night Only: This groundbreaking event is the first of its kind at MMU, making it a must-attend experience for all!

🎟 Tickets: ONLY RM 5.00!
This is your chance to witness history, win exclusive prizes, and enjoy a night of thrilling entertainment — all for just RM 5.00!

📅 Date: 12 November 2024 (Tuesday)
⌚ Time: 8.00 p.m. – 10.00 p.m.
📍 Venue: Persada Permata Dunia (Main Hall), MMU Melaka

🔥 LIMITED SEATS AVAILABLE 🔥
Secure your tickets now and be part of MMU Melaka’s biggest martial arts event of the year!

Thank you!

[PEMBUBARAN AHLI JAWATAN KUASA PSSCPUH 2023/2024] 

Pada tanggal 5 Disember 2024 telah berlangsungnya Mesyuarat Agung Tahunan kali ke-24. Dalam majlis tersebut telah berlakunya pelantikan ahli jawatankuasa baharu bagi sesi 2024/2025 sekaligus menandakan tamatnya perkhidmatan ahli jawatankuasa PSSCPUH MMU Melaka bagi sesi 2023/2024. 

Kami ingin mengucapkan ribuan terima kasih kepada PSSCPUH MMU Melaka kerana telah memberikan kami peluang untuk menabur bakti dalam Seni Silat Cekak Pusaka Ustaz Hanafi.

Kepada rakan-rakan seperjuangan yang bakal menggantikan kami, tahniah dan selamat maju jaya kami ucapkan kepada anda semua. Semoga terus maju dan menjalankan tugas dengan penuh amanah semasa anda berkhidmat.

[ AMBANG MERDEKA 2024 ]

🇲🇾🎉 Sertai kami dalam meraikan detik bersejarah, Ambang Merdeka: Gema Gemilang, dengan sepenuhnya!

🗓 Tarikh: 27, 28, dan 29 Ogos 
🕒 Masa: 10 pagi hingga 11 malam 
📍 Tempat: Multimedia University, Melaka

Dari matahari terbit hingga terbenam, atur cara kami penuh dengan aktiviti menarik! 🗺✨

✨ Hidupkan nostalgia sambil bersaing dalam permainan Sukan Rakyat kami, nikmati pelbagai hidangan Malaysia di gerai dan trak makanan Merdeka Fiesta kami, dan pastikan anda hadir untuk menyaksikan persembahan hebat yang telah kami kumpulkan untuk Malam Perasmian Merdeka Fiesta yang paling mendebarkan di Padang Utama, MMU! 🌟

Jangan lepaskan peluang ini untuk meraikan Merdeka dengan gaya dan untuk menjadi sebahagian daripada malam epik yang akan meninggalkan kenangan yang tidak dapat dilupakan. Mari kita bersama-sama menghayati warisan nasional kita dengan sambutan penuh kebanggaan dan kegembiraan! 🇲🇾🎆

"Striving for Community Cohesion"
Students' College Committee 2023/2024,
Multimedia University, Melaka.

caption:
Martial Arts Social Night 2024 👊🥋

The Martial Arts Social Night 2024 is organized by Martial Arts Alliance in collaboration with Persatuan Silat Cekak Pusaka Ustaz Hanafi, Wing Chun, Aikido, and Judo Club.

This event is for experiencing cultural art, discipline, and traditions behind martial arts, creating a deeper appreciation for the craft.

Not only that, there is a drama that we made for Entertainment, which is we put a live martial arts demonstration offering thrilling entertainment, showcasing skills, and precision. 

Stay tuned for Martial Arts Social Night 2024 !!

*[MOVIE NIGHT FUNDRAISING]*

**PROMOTION!!!**

Good day, ladies and gentlemen 👋. We are now back with another movie for you this weekend 🫣!

Day 📆: _Every Friday_
Time 🕔: _8.30 pm - 11.00 pm_

This Week's Movie:
👉 *The Fall Guy* 👈

Cinema Hall:
👉 *MSMX 2001* 👈

Ticket Price: RM3 only (comes with free beverage ‼)

_"After leaving the business one year earlier, battle-scarred stuntman Colt Seavers springs back into action when the star of a big studio movie suddenly disappears. As the mystery surrounding the missing actor deepens, Colt soon finds himself ensnared in a sinister plot that pushes him to the edge of a fall more dangerous than any stunt."_

Book your tickets 🫵:
https://forms.gle/cf69VNQUxTspHruK7
...or pay as you walk-in!

For more information:
013-364 2182 - Director (Ikhwan)

Kindly register by filling out the Google Form provided below by 25th August 2024.

[ GEMA GEMILANG: KEJOHANAN FUTSAL SARONG ]

Keterujaan semakin dirasai untuk kejohanan futsal yang akan datang sempena sambutan Ambang Merdeka 2024 ⚽🔥 Dengan sentuhan elemen tradisional, peserta dikehendaki untuk memakai kain sarung semasa bermain! Kumpulkan pasukan anda dan bersaing untuk memenangi hadiah wang tunai. Daftar sekarang! ✨

"Striving for Community Cohesion"

caption:
[KEJOHANAN WAJADIRI PERINGKAT KEBANGSAAN 2024]
.
Tarikh 📅: 7/9/2024 (Sabtu)
Masa 🕥: 8.00 am - 6.00 pm
Tempat 🏣: Kolej Kediaman Kampus Pagoh Universiti Tun Hussein Onn Malaysia
.
Persatuan Seni Silat Cekak Pusaka Ustaz Hanafi cawangan Melaka telah menghantar satu kontinjen untuk bertanding dalam kejohanan ini dalam kategori Persembahan Penerangan. Malangnya, kontinjen Melaka tidak dapat untuk pulang dengan pingat.

Sebaliknya, saudara Megat Nur Hasanal Putera bin Norrasidi selaku presiden PSSCPUH MMU Melaka, telah berjaya meraih anugerah Pegawai Penerangan Terbaik. Syabas dan tahniah diucapkan kepada beliau.

Kalah dan menang adat pertandingan. Semoga cawangan Melaka kembali lagi tahun hadaapan dengan semangat yang lebih membara 🔥.
.
#silatcekakpusakahanafi #scph #wajadiri #kejohananwajadiriscph #sambutanbulankebangsaan

latestComments.text: Tahniah dan syabas diucapkan kepada kontinjen Melaka diatas penyertaan Wajadiri 2024 🔥

caption:
Martial Arts Social Night 2024 👊🥋

The Martial Arts Social Night 2024 is organized by Martial Arts Alliance in collaboration with Persatuan Silat Cekak Pusaka Ustaz Hanafi, Wing Chun, Aikido, and Judo Club.

This event is for experiencing cultural art, discipline, and traditions behind martial arts, creating a deeper appreciation for the craft.

Not only that, there is a drama that we made for Entertainment, which is we put a live martial arts demonstration offering thrilling entertainment, showcasing skills, and precision. 

Stay tuned for Martial Arts Social Night 2024 !!

🌙 RAMADHAN SWEET CHARITY 🌙

Together We Share, Together We Care

⸻

💖 Infak Kasih | 7 March

At the masjid, we begin with service and sincerity. We clean the sacred space together, then cook side by side to prepare meals for the community. Through simple acts done with pure intention, we transform effort into charity — because together we share, together we care.

⸻

🍽 Iftar Jamaie | 7 March

As the sun sets, MMU Melaka students and the surrounding local community gather to break fast as one. Sharing food, prayers, and conversations, we celebrate unity and gratitude — a reminder that Ramadhan is most beautiful when experienced together.

⸻

🤝 Tautan Kasih | 8 March

Held at an orphanage, this day is about giving time and attention. We clean, connect, and share moments of laughter before breaking fast together. In these simple moments, bonds are formed and hearts are touched, reminding every child that they are not alone.

⸻

🌌 Singgah Sahur | 9 March

In the quiet hours before dawn, kindness continues its journey. Volunteers distribute sahur meals to those in need, ensuring no one begins their fast in hunger or solitude. A silent act of compassion that proves care does not sleep.

⸻

💛 Every act counts. Every moment matters.
Together we share, together we care… together we scan the QR to give.

[ AMBANG MERDEKA 2024 ]

🇲🇾🎉 Sertai kami dalam meraikan detik bersejarah, Ambang Merdeka: Gema Gemilang, dengan sepenuhnya!

🗓 Tarikh: 27, 28, dan 29 Ogos 
🕒 Masa: 10 pagi hingga 11 malam 
📍 Tempat: Multimedia University, Melaka

Dari matahari terbit hingga terbenam, atur cara kami penuh dengan aktiviti menarik! 🗺✨

✨ Hidupkan nostalgia sambil bersaing dalam permainan Sukan Rakyat kami, nikmati pelbagai hidangan Malaysia di gerai dan trak makanan Merdeka Fiesta kami, dan pastikan anda hadir untuk menyaksikan persembahan hebat yang telah kami kumpulkan untuk Malam Perasmian Merdeka Fiesta yang paling mendebarkan di Padang Utama, MMU! 🌟

Jangan lepaskan peluang ini untuk meraikan Merdeka dengan gaya dan untuk menjadi sebahagian daripada malam epik yang akan meninggalkan kenangan yang tidak dapat dilupakan. Mari kita bersama-sama menghayati warisan nasional kita dengan sambutan penuh kebanggaan dan kegembiraan! 🇲🇾🎆

"Striving for Community Cohesion"
Students' College Committee 2023/2024,
Multimedia University, Melaka.

caption:
[MARTIAL ARTS SOCIAL NIGHT - MARTIAL ARTS DRAMA]

✨ MMU Melaka's First Ever Martial Arts Drama – Martial Arts Social Night! ✨

Get ready for an electrifying night filled with action, drama, and incredible martial arts performances! 🎭💥 The first ever Martial Arts Drama at MMU Melaka is here, and it’s set to be an unforgettable experience for everyone!

Why You Can't Miss This Event: 

🔥 Epic Martial Arts Drama: Watch as skilled martial artists bring an original story to life with jaw-dropping action and choreography! 

🎁 Exclusive Lucky Draw Prizes: Be lucky to take home exciting prizes during our special draw!

 💥 One Night Only: This groundbreaking event is the first of its kind at MMU, making it a must-attend experience for all!

🎟 Tickets: ONLY RM 5.00!
This is your chance to witness history, win exclusive prizes, and enjoy a night of thrilling entertainment — all for just RM 5.00!

📅 Date: 12 November 2024 (Tuesday)
⌚ Time: 8.00 p.m. – 10.00 p.m.
📍 Venue: Persada Permata Dunia (Main Hall), MMU Melaka

🔥 LIMITED SEATS AVAILABLE 🔥
Secure your tickets now and be part of MMU Melaka’s biggest martial arts event of the year!

Thank you!

Martial Arts Social Night 2024, 
Martial Arts Alliance 2024
“Ramadhan Kareem to all our Muslim brothers and sisters. May this blessed month bring you closer to Allah, fill your days with peace, and your nights with prayer. Selamat menunaikan ibadah puasa.”

caption:

.
Tarikh: 13/6/2024
Masa: 9.00 pm - 11.00 pm
Tempat: Surau Kompleks KDN, Ayer Keroh, Melaka
.
Seramai 18 pelajar daripada MMU bersama 44 pesilat yang lain telah diijazahkan, merangkumi pelbagai peringkat termasuk Peringkat Asas hingga Peringkat Tamat. Sekalung ucapan tahniah diucapkan kepada para pesilat yang telah diijazahkan, semoga ilmu yang dipelajari dapat dimanfaatkan sebaik-baiknya.
